name: crowe-logic
description: Crowe Logic Foundry agent, chat, plans, and tool execution inside the IDE.

chatParticipants.name: crowe
chatParticipants.description: Ask Crowe Logic — your Foundry agent.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Draft a plan before running tools.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the selected file or symbol.

commands.name: refactor
commands.description: Refactor the selection for readability and correctness.

commands.name: tests
commands.description: Write unit tests for the selection.

commands.name: find-bugs
commands.description: Review the selection for bugs and edge cases.

commands.name: dataset
commands.description: Show or set the active CroweLM dataset context.

commands.name: steer
commands.description: Persist operator steering for this chat session.

commands.name: transcript
commands.description: Show the last full answer and reasoning transcript.

commands.title: Crowe Logic: Open in Remote IDE

croweLogic.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter that runs the Foundry headless agent.

croweLogic.foundryPath.description: Filesystem path to the crowe-logic-foundry checkout.

enumDescriptions: Automatically select the first available model in the chain
Titan — flagship reasoning (Llama 3.3 70B Instruct via watsonx.ai)
Apex — high-performance reasoning with vision (Llama 4 Maverick 17B/128E)
Oracle — balanced reasoning + tool use (Mistral Medium 2505)
Sovereign — sovereign-grade reasoning (Mistral Large 2512)
Prime — Crowe-tuned target (IBM Granite 4 H Small)
Nexus — efficient general reasoning (IBM Granite 3.0 8B Instruct)
Reason — lightweight LoRA-tunable reasoning (Llama 3.1 8B base)
Synapse — raw Granite 3.1 8B base; LoRA fine-tune substrate
Monolith — heavy-iron LoRA target (Llama 3.1 70B GPTQ)
Forge — code generation default (IBM Granite 8B Code Instruct)
Architect — long-context architecture work (GPT-OSS 120B)
Mason — workhorse code edits (Mistral Small 3.1 24B Instruct)
Lens — vision backbone (Llama 3.2 11B Vision Instruct)
Spectrum — high-fidelity vision (Llama 3.2 90B Vision Instruct)
Polyglot — multilingual routing (Mistral Medium 2505)
Tendril — default multilingual embeddings (IBM Granite 278M)
Filament — English retriever (IBM Slate 125M v2)
Strand — edge embeddings (IBM Slate 30M v2)
Capillary — cross-lingual embeddings (Multilingual E5 large)
Mote — tiny prototype embeddings (MiniLM L6 v2)
Sieve — final-stage reranker (MS-MARCO MiniLM L12 cross-encoder)
Tempo — short-horizon time-series forecast (Granite TTM 512/96 r2)
Cadence — mid-horizon time-series forecast (Granite TTM 1024/96 r2)
Pulse — long-horizon time-series forecast (Granite TTM 1536/96 r2)
Warden — content + jailbreak moderation (Granite Guardian 3.0 8B)
Aegis — multimodal safety for image inputs (Llama Guard 3 11B Vision)
croweLogic.model.description: CroweLM model to use for chat sessions.

croweLogic.maxToolRounds.description: Maximum tool-call rounds before the agent stops. Increase for complex multi-step tasks.

enumDescriptions: Match the current VS Code color theme
Always use Crowe Logic Dark
Always use Crowe Logic Light
croweLogic.theme.description: Color theme for the Crowe Logic interface.

croweLogic.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the Crowe Logic control plane. Used for `/api/ide/launch`, billing, and other HTTP endpoints.

croweLogic.ideUrl.description: Remote IDE origin used as a fallback when handoff fails.

walkthroughs.title: Welcome to Crowe Logic
walkthroughs.description: Get started with the Crowe Logic Foundry agent.

steps.title: Open the chat
steps.description: Press ⌃⌘I (Ctrl+Cmd+I) to open the chat panel and type @crowe to talk to the Foundry agent.

steps.title: Watch the plan build
steps.description: Plans and tool runs stream into the Crowe Logic activity bar pane on the left.

steps.title: Sign in with your API token
steps.description:
Run **Crowe Logic: Sign In** from the command palette and paste your `crowe_pat_…` token. The token is stored in the OS keychain and unlocks programmatic access to the AI platform.
[Sign In](command:crowe-logic.signIn)

steps.title: Hand off to the remote IDE
steps.description:
Need a full Foundry workspace? Run **Crowe Logic: Open in Remote IDE** to launch a single-use session in your code-server container.
[Open Remote IDE](command:crowe-logic.openInRemoteIde)
